query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A grayscale close-up photograph of a human shadow cast on a smooth, light-colored wall. The dark silhouette shows a person in profile wearing a baseball cap, with the outline of the head, cap brim, shoulders, and upper torso visible against the pale background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy black and white photograph with soft focus showing the shadow of a cap-wearing figure projected onto a light wall. Heavy analog film grain and blurred edges give the silhouette a dreamlike, textured quality that emphasizes shape over detail.
